columns.extraction_plan: The trial is identified as "SWOG-1216" in the article title on page 1. The "Trial Design and Conduct" section on page 2 explicitly states, "The S1216 trial was a phase III, randomized, open-label, multicenter trial..." Additionally, page 8 lists the "CLINICAL TRIAL INFORMATION" as "NCT01809691 (SWOG S1216)".
